alt: Leafy seadragon carefully maneuvering its long pipe-like snout to suck in tiny prey
caption: Lacking teeth and a stomach, they feed continuously by using their long tubular snouts to suck in tiny mysid shrimp and plankton.
acquisitionNotes: Manually curated leafy seadragon diet image. Local WebP ingested from https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/1/11/Leafy_Seadragon_Phycodurus_eques_2500px_PLW_edit.jpg
